question: What text overlay is displayed in the top left corner during the presentation of the finished fried onion rings? A. PANKO BREAD CRUMBS B. ALL-PURPOSE FLOUR C. ONION RINGS D. VEGETABLE OIL

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A gas burner ignites with blue flames beneath a metal pot containing bubbling oil. Breaded onion rings fry in the hot oil until golden brown. Wooden chopsticks lift the cooked rings onto a white rectangular plate. The white plate holds golden-brown rings alongside small dishes of red ketchup and creamy yellow sauce on a bamboo placemat.

Describe each step as it happens during the initial cooking sequence.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the metallic gas stove burner ignites producing a blue flame; at 2s, three breaded rings fry in hot oil while a fourth is added; at 4s, wooden chopsticks lift a golden-brown onion ring out of the pot; at 6s, a person holds a white rectangular plate with seven arranged onion rings.

canonical_answer: Golden brown onion rings are frying in the bubbling hot oil.
